subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy grandeur, through which all things have derived their greatness, and by the effulgent lights of Thy countenance [3.5s]... ...O my God and my Master! I am Thy servant and the son of Thy servant. I have risen from my couch
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بعظمتک التی منها استعظم کل شیء و بانوار وجهک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for nearness to God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
